LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT MEETS THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE HEALTH & SAFETY CODE. THE COURT WILL EXECUTE THE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT. ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Johnson, Esq. (510-848-8880) of the chandler Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement meets the requirements of the Health & Safety Code. The court will execute the proposed form of order and proposed judgment. Order and Consent Judgment signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/RBU)
